arts.ttl: Serie A | Cagliari 0-4 Napoli: Match Report
arts.sum: Napoli secured their third consecutive victory with a commanding 4-0 win against Cagliari, featuring goals from Giovanni Di Lorenzo, Khvicha Kvaratskhelia, Romelu Lukaku, and Alessandro Buongiorno. The match showcased strong teamwork, as the strikers assisted each other throughout the game. Lukaku, following an impressive debut off the bench against Parma, earned his first start under coach Antonio Conte, while Kvaratskhelia returned from an ankle injury. Cagliari, missing Matteo Prati, fielded Gianluca Gaetano against his former club. arts.ttl: Napoli Player Ratings vs Cagliari: Newcomers Leave Wrackage in Sardinia
arts.sum: Napoli picked up where they left off before the international break, demolishing out-of-sorts Cagliari 4-0 at the Unipol Domus. Despite an emphatic scoreline, Sunday's game in Sardinia wasn't plain sailing for Antonio Conte's charges.
